upgrade_source: Wikipedia (Church Avenue station IND Culver Line); MTA records
notes: Three elevators installed during a 2008 renovation, opening July 7, 2008. Station on the IND Culver Line serving F and G trains at Church and McDonald Avenues in Kensington. Note: scaffolded data lists routes as 2/5 Nostrand/IRT, but user specifies F/G Culver/IND. Research covers the IND Culver Line station per user instructions. The IRT Nostrand Avenue Line Church Av (2/5) was separately made accessible in Spring 1999. Different from Church Av B/Q BMT Brighton (ID 44, accessible 2025) and Church Av B/Q (ID 243).
